ui.meta.title: CodeDAC | Smartphone Utility Apps
ui.meta.desc: CodeDAC builds and publishes 13 smartphone utility apps including Clipboard+, AutoStart+ and FloatCalc+.
ui.hero.title:
Make your phone
smarter
ui.hero.sub: CodeDAC builds smartphone utility apps <br class="br-pc" />that make everyday life easier.
ui.about.title: About Us
ui.about.lead: True to its name, CodeDAC is built on Code to deliver Development And Consulting. Today we design and publish smartphone utility apps people reach for every day, and we aim to grow into a trusted technology partner that solves our clients’ challenges with solid engineering.
ui.about.c1.d: We favor clarity and instant usability over complex features.
ui.about.c2.d: We minimize unnecessary permissions and ads, and respect your data.
ui.about.c3.d: Launch is just the start — we keep improving with user feedback.
ui.services.title: Services
ui.services.lead: From idea to development and operations, CodeDAC partners with you across the whole journey.
ui.services.s1.d: We build Android, iOS, Windows desktop and cross-platform apps from planning to launch and operation.
ui.services.s2.d: We build responsive websites, web applications and admin systems.
ui.services.s3.d: We advise on architecture, tech-stack selection and code review to guide key decisions.
ui.services.s4.d: We keep services healthy with stable operations, performance tuning and CI/CD automation.
ui.apps.title: Our Apps
ui.apps.lead: Smartphone utility apps built and published by CodeDAC. Tap a screenshot to view it larger.
ui.shotsHint: Tap a screenshot to view it larger.
ui.reviews.title: What users say
ui.reviews.lead: Real 5-star reviews left on Google Play.

clipboard.name: Clipboard+
clipboard.desc: Auto-saves your clipboard history to paste anywhere, anytime.
clipboard.tagline: Auto-save every copy with the smartest clipboard manager for Android
clipboard.long: Clipboard+ is an Android clipboard manager that automatically saves every copied text and image in real time. A resizable floating overlay lets you reach your clipboard history from any screen without switching apps. Organize frequently used text into snippets and groups, and paste any clip fast with keyword search, a home screen widget, and a notification panel. You can also export your history to PDF and back up or restore your clips anytime.
features: Auto-save copied text and images in real time
Resizable floating overlay for use over any app
Organize frequent text into snippets and groups
Instant search and filter by keyword, text, image, or date
Fast paste via widget, Quick Settings tile, and notification panel
Export clipboard history to PDF, plus backup and restore

faq.q: How is my clipboard history saved?
faq.a: Every copied text and image is saved automatically in real time, so you can pull any clip back anytime without extra steps.

faq.q: Can I access my clipboard history while using other apps?
faq.a: Yes. A resizable floating overlay lets you reach your history from any screen without switching apps.

faq.q: What is the difference between Free and Pro?
faq.a: Free gives you the full manager with ads, while Pro removes ads, stores unlimited clipboard history, and unlocks all features. With FreePass you can watch an ad to unlock Pro features for 24 hours.

autostart.name: AutoStart+
autostart.desc: Auto-launch your apps on boot. No root required, set once.
autostart.tagline: Auto start your apps the moment your phone boots. No root, set once, runs forever.
autostart.long: AutoStart+ is the easiest auto start manager for Android, launching your selected apps automatically the moment your device boots up, with no root required. Set it once and your apps launch at every startup without any manual tapping. The free version auto starts 1 app, while PRO unlocks unlimited apps launched in the order you choose. It notifies you if a launch fails, and guides you through the auto start settings on OEM devices like Samsung and Xiaomi.
features: Instantly auto-launches your selected apps on boot
Works on standard Android devices with no root required
Add installed apps in seconds and toggle each on or off with one tap
Smart boot notification alerts you if an app fails to launch
Boot overlay banner lets you launch apps before unlocking (PRO)
Auto start unlimited apps in your chosen order (PRO)

faq.q: My apps don't launch after boot. What should I do?
faq.a: Some manufacturers (Samsung, Xiaomi, and others) block app autostart on their own. Follow the in-app guide to complete the manufacturer-specific 'allow autostart' setting.

faq.q: How many apps can I auto start?
faq.a: The free version supports 1 app, while the PRO version lets you auto start an unlimited number of apps.

faq.q: Will it drain my battery?
faq.a: AutoStart+ runs only once at boot and is not an always-on background app, so it has almost no impact on battery life.

floatcalc.name: FloatCalc+
floatcalc.desc: A floating calculator, FX & unit converter on top of any app.
floatcalc.tagline: A floating calculator that stays on top of any app so you never leave to do the math.
floatcalc.long: FloatCalc+ is a floating calculator that stays on top of any app, so you never have to switch screens just to do quick math. A built-in currency converter, unit converter, and quick memo all work right inside the overlay window. Drag the window wherever you need it, then copy results or save them to a memo with a single tap. It's lightweight, fast, and works offline (FX rates are cached daily).
features: Floats over any app — YouTube, maps, browser, banking, shopping, spreadsheets
Draggable overlay window with one-tap copy of results to the clipboard
Unit converter for length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, and time
Real-time ECB exchange rates for 30+ currencies, refreshed daily
Quick memo to save calculation results or notes from the floating window
Choose a start mode (Calculator/Unit/FX/Memo), 8 themes, works offline

faq.q: Do I have to close my app every time I want to calculate?
faq.a: No. FloatCalc+ works as a floating window that stays on top of other apps, so you can calculate without leaving your shopping, banking, or browser screen.

faq.q: Where do the exchange rates come from?
faq.a: It uses real-time ECB (European Central Bank) rates, refreshed daily. You can convert USD, EUR, JPY, KRW, CNY and 30+ world currencies right inside the overlay, and rates are cached each day so it works offline too.

faq.q: How much can I use for free?
faq.a: The free tier includes 5 sessions per day, up to 20 minutes each. One default theme is free, while 7 additional themes and some features are available with Pro.

floatcrypto.name: FloatCrypto+
floatcrypto.desc: Live Bitcoin & crypto prices floating over any app.
floatcrypto.tagline: Keep the live Bitcoin price floating on your screen — 100% free.
floatcrypto.long: FloatCrypto+ floats a real-time crypto ticker on top of any app — YouTube, Chrome, games, Telegram — so you can track BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE, BNB and 1,000+ altcoins without ever switching apps. Powered by Binance market data with a CoinGecko fallback, it adds live charts, price alerts, and a watchlist in one place. It is 100% free with no login, no email, and no wallet required — ready to use in seconds.
features: Floating overlay that keeps live Bitcoin and Ethereum prices on top of every app — no app switching
Drag to move, pinch to resize, with adjustable opacity and font size
Live 1D/7D/30D crypto charts powered by Binance data, with 24h change %
Instant price alerts with upper and lower thresholds and 24/7 background monitoring
Fast coin search across 1,000+ tokens with a real-time watchlist and price tracker
100% free, no login or wallet needed, running as a lightweight, battery-friendly service

faq.q: Is FloatCrypto+ free? Do I need an account?
faq.a: It is 100% free. There is no login, no email, and no wallet connection — just install and start tracking in seconds.

faq.q: Which coins are supported and where does the data come from?
faq.a: It supports Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, XRP, Dogecoin, BNB and over 1,000 altcoins, using Binance market data with a CoinGecko fallback for reliability.

faq.q: Can I see prices while using other apps?
faq.a: Yes. The floating overlay stays on top of every app, so you can watch live prices while using YouTube, playing games, or chatting — no app switching needed.

floattimer.name: FloatTimer+
floattimer.desc: A floating interval, Pomodoro & multi-timer over any app.
floattimer.tagline: An interval, Pomodoro, and multi-timer, counter, and stopwatch that floats on top of every app.
floattimer.long: FloatTimer+ is a floating overlay app that keeps an interval timer, multi-timer, counter, and stopwatch on top of any app you use. Your timer stays visible while you multitask, and you can drag it anywhere on screen while customizing its size, opacity, and background color. It runs in the background, so it keeps going even when you switch apps or lock the screen. Set it once and keep cooking, exercising, studying, or gaming without ever losing sight of your timer.
features: Floating overlay — timers, counters, and a stopwatch float on any app, with per-item size, opacity, and background color
Multi-timer — run several custom hours/minutes/seconds countdowns at once and attach a memo to each
Interval timer — build Work/Rest phases with rounds for HIIT and Tabata, plus one-tap presets (Pomodoro, HIIT, Tabata, breaks)
Tally counter — tap-to-count floating counter with a custom step to add or subtract any amount (+1, +2, +5, +10…)
Floating stopwatch — start, pause, and reset without ever leaving your current app
Statistics, streaks, and backup — daily usage history and streaks, timer/counter file backup and restore, CSV export (Pro)

faq.q: Does the timer stay visible while I use other apps?
faq.a: Yes. The timer, counter, and stopwatch float on top of any app and run in the background, so they keep going even when you switch apps or lock the screen.

faq.q: Does it support interval timers and Pomodoro?
faq.a: Yes. You can build custom Work/Rest phases with multiple rounds for HIIT and Tabata, and there are one-tap presets for Pomodoro, HIIT, Tabata, short break, and long break.

faq.q: Can I run multiple timers or counters at once?
faq.a: Running several timers and counters at the same time is a Pro feature. The free version still lets you use a single timer, counter, and stopwatch.

volumebooster.name: VolumeBooster+
volumebooster.desc: Volume booster, equalizer & bass boost with real, measured dB.
volumebooster.tagline: Make every app louder in real, measured decibels — not a meaningless 200%.
volumebooster.long: VolumeBooster+ is a volume booster that raises your entire system output — quiet speakers, low earphones, hard-to-hear videos, calls, music and games — so you finally hear them clearly. It boosts in true decibels (0 to +15 dB) rather than a meaningless "200%", and shows WHO-based Safe / Caution / Danger zones so you can turn things up while protecting your hearing. It combines a 5-band equalizer, bass booster, 3D virtualizer and AutoEQ headphone correction in a single app.
features: Real-decibel volume boost (0 → +15 dB) with Safe/Caution/Danger labels, boosting every app system-wide
Loudness Maximizer plus an always-on peak limiter for genuinely louder sound with no clipping or distortion
5-band Equalizer with 12 tuned presets (Pop, Rock, Vocal, Movie, Classical, Jazz, EDM, Gaming, Night and more)
Bass Booster + 3D Virtualizer for deeper, wider sound
AutoEQ headphone correction using measured frequency-response data
Hearing Health Score + WHO-based exposure monitoring, Sleep Timer, Channel Balance and Floating Widget (Pro)

faq.q: Does it really make my phone louder?
faq.a: Yes. The Loudness Maximizer uses multiband compression and makeup gain to genuinely increase perceived loudness, and it raises the whole system output from 0 up to +15 dB — not just one app. It applies to music, videos, YouTube, games, calls and everything else.

faq.q: How is this different from '200%' boosters?
faq.a: Numbers like "200%" or "500%" that other boosters shout are meaningless. VolumeBooster+ shows the real gain in decibels and marks WHO-based Safe, Caution and Danger zones, so you always know exactly how loud you really are.

faq.q: Is the displayed dB an exact measurement?
faq.a: The decibel value is an estimate based on your system volume and the applied gain, and real loudness varies by device, headphones and content. The app is not a medical device, so if you notice ear pain or ringing, lower the volume and consult a professional.

photocleaner.name: PhotoCleaner+
photocleaner.desc: Hide personal info in photos & PDFs, fully on-device.
photocleaner.tagline: Hide personal info in photos and PDFs with a solid mask, entirely on your device.
photocleaner.long: PhotoCleaner+ hides personal information in photos and PDFs entirely on your device. It covers sensitive areas with a solid, opaque mask (not a blur or mosaic, so covered areas can't be recovered) and exports a clean copy. A built-in detector suggests likely sensitive text such as ID numbers, cards, phone numbers, and emails as a starting point, but you draw and adjust masks by hand to decide exactly what gets hidden. No photo is ever uploaded, everything runs offline, and no gallery or storage permission is ever requested.
features: Solid opaque mask that can't be recovered (not a blur or mosaic)
Draw masks by hand, then move, resize or delete them, with zoom for precision
Built-in detection suggests likely sensitive text (ID numbers, cards, phones, emails) to get you started
Mask photos, ID cards and multi-page PDF documents
EXIF & GPS notice, and every saved or shared copy is re-encoded with no EXIF
Zero permissions, and clean image export with no watermark for everyone

faq.q: Is the masking a blur or mosaic?
faq.a: No. Masking uses one style only, a solid opaque fill, and covered areas can't be recovered. With Pro you can pick any mask color.

faq.q: Are my photos uploaded anywhere?
faq.a: No. Everything runs offline on your device and no photo is ever uploaded. The app also never requests gallery or storage permission.

faq.q: Can I rely on auto-detection alone before exporting?
faq.a: Detection is only a starting point that suggests likely sensitive text. Always review the suggestions and add or remove masks yourself before exporting.

secretalbum.name: SecretAlbum+
secretalbum.desc: Hide photos & videos with AES-256 encryption and a PIN lock.
secretalbum.tagline: Hide and protect your photos and videos with AES-256 encryption and a PIN lock.
secretalbum.long: SecretAlbum+ is a private vault that protects your precious photos and videos with military-grade AES-256 encryption. It works entirely offline on your device and never uploads files to any external server. Every file you import is encrypted instantly and cannot be accessed without your personal key, disappearing completely from your gallery with no traces left behind. You can even disguise the app icon as a Calculator, Notes, Weather, or Clock app so no one knows it is installed.
features: Military-grade AES-256 encryption instantly protects every file
6-digit PIN lock with email temporary-PIN recovery after 5 failed attempts
Disguise mode changes the icon to a Calculator, Notes, Weather, or Clock app
Import multiple photos and videos from the gallery, with originals removed automatically
Full-screen viewer with pinch-to-zoom and an automatic slideshow
Works 100% offline with lossless restore back to your gallery anytime

faq.q: Are my files sent to any external server or cloud?
faq.a: No. SecretAlbum+ works completely offline and never connects to any external server. All files are stored only in an encrypted space on your device.

faq.q: What happens if I forget my PIN?
faq.a: After 5 consecutive incorrect entries of your 6-digit PIN, a one-time temporary PIN is automatically emailed to your registered recovery address so you are never permanently locked out.

faq.q: Can I move hidden files back to my gallery?
faq.a: Yes. You can restore any file to your gallery at any time, and the decryption process is lossless, so every photo and video returns exactly as the original with no quality loss.

readfocus.name: ReadFocus+
readfocus.desc: A dyslexia & ADHD reading aid with line highlight & mask.
readfocus.tagline: A dyslexia & ADHD reading aid: line highlight and reading mask keep your eyes on track and ease eye strain.
readfocus.long: ReadFocus+ is a reading ruler, reading mask and reading aid for dyslexia and ADHD on Android. Grant the overlay permission once and a translucent focus strip floats on top of any app — ebook readers, browsers, PDF, news, comics — keeping your eyes on the line you're reading. It reduces skipping or re-reading the same row, easing eye strain and boosting reading concentration and efficiency.
features: Line Highlight (Reading Ruler): illuminates your current line to keep eyes on track
Reading Mask: dims everything except your reading zone for tunnel-vision focus
Fully adjustable focus strip: height (50dp–300dp), opacity (10%–100%), and corner roundness
6 color themes (2 free + 4 Pro)
Works on top of any app — ebooks, PDF, webtoons, news, research papers
Pro: ad-free experience, unlimited overlay time, and keep screen on while reading

faq.q: How does ReadFocus+ work?
faq.a: Grant the overlay permission once and a semi-transparent focus strip floats on top of any app. Drag it to the line you're reading and your eyes stay on track instead of wandering or skipping rows.

faq.q: Which apps does it work with?
faq.a: It works on top of any app on screen — ebook and PDF readers, research papers, web articles, blogs, news, study notes, textbooks, comics, webtoons, and long emails or chat history.

faq.q: Is it free to use?
faq.a: Yes. The free version gives 60 minutes of overlay time per session and 2 color themes. Pro adds an ad-free experience, all 6 themes, and unlimited overlay time — and you can also watch a short rewarded ad to unlock any Pro feature free for 24 hours.

colorcards.name: Color Cards+
colorcards.desc: Talking color flashcards that help toddlers learn colors.
colorcards.tagline: Talking color flashcards where toddlers see, hear, and repeat to learn colors
colorcards.long: Color Cards+ is a talking, listening color flashcard app for toddlers. It presents child-friendly object cards across six colors (red, blue, yellow, green, orange, and purple) and reads each name aloud so children can repeat along and learn colors naturally. Multiple learning modes such as auto play, hide word, card shuffle, and a bilingual view are supported across many languages. A clean, distraction-free environment helps your child stay focused while learning.
features: Six color categories: red, blue, yellow, green, orange, and purple
Talking flashcards that read each object's name aloud
Auto play and hide-word modes for varied learning
Shuffle cards to review in a different order
Bilingual mode to show English too, with multi-language support
Background music and an ad-free option via Pro or Free Pass

faq.q: Which colors can my child learn?
faq.a: Six colors: red, blue, yellow, green, orange, and purple, each taught with familiar object cards that match the color.

faq.q: Can the cards be read aloud?
faq.a: Yes. These are talking flashcards that speak each object's name aloud, so children can listen and repeat to learn colors.

faq.q: Can I use it without ads?
faq.a: You can remove ads and access all color cards with a Pro subscription, or watch a rewarded ad to unlock all content with a 24-hour Free Pass.

wordcards.name: Word Cards+
wordcards.desc: Flashcards for toddlers to speak and listen to words.
wordcards.tagline: Your child's first words — see them, hear them, and say them with cards.
wordcards.long: Word Cards+ is a picture flashcard app that helps toddlers learn words in a fun way. With cute cards on familiar themes like animals, fruits, vehicles, and everyday objects, children can look at each picture, hear the word, and say it out loud. Clean white backgrounds and clear illustrations help little ones focus on each object and naturally grow their vocabulary.
features: Themed flashcards for animals, fruits, vehicles, and everyday objects
Cute, clear illustrations that draw children's interest and focus
Listen-and-repeat learning with the spoken word on every card
Clean white backgrounds that keep the focus on each object
Simple, toddler-friendly controls for swiping through cards alone
Practical vocabulary built around familiar, everyday things

faq.q: What age is this app for?
faq.a: It is made for toddlers who are starting to speak. They can learn words by looking at pictures, hearing the word, and repeating it out loud.

faq.q: What word themes are included?
faq.a: Flashcards cover familiar themes for young children, including animals, fruits, vehicles, and everyday objects.

faq.q: Can my child use it alone?
faq.a: Swiping through cards is simple enough for toddlers to view and listen on their own, and it works even better when a parent joins in.

sleepbaby.name: SleepBaby+
sleepbaby.desc: Soothing lullabies and white noise to help your baby sleep.
sleepbaby.tagline: Soothing lullabies and white noise to help your baby sleep.
sleepbaby.long: SleepBaby+ is a lullaby and white noise app that helps your baby fall asleep peacefully. It offers calming sounds such as Brahms' Lullaby, gentle ocean waves, a flowing valley stream, and a crackling bonfire. A built-in sleep timer stops playback automatically after your chosen duration, and adjustable volume brings peaceful rest to both baby and parents.
features: Warm classic lullabies including Brahms' Lullaby
Natural white noise such as ocean waves, valley stream, and bonfire
Sleep timer for 30 min, 45 min, 1, 2, 3 hours, or unlimited
Playback stops automatically when the timer ends
Easy volume adjustment
Built-in app sharing and feedback options

faq.q: What sounds does it play?
faq.a: It offers soothing lullabies and white noise, including Brahms' Lullaby, gentle ocean waves, a valley stream, and a crackling bonfire.

faq.q: Does it turn off automatically after a while?
faq.a: Yes. You can set a sleep timer for 30 min, 45 min, 1, 2, or 3 hours, or unlimited, and playback stops automatically when the time is up.

faq.q: Can I adjust the volume?
faq.a: Yes. You can freely adjust the volume within the app to find the perfect level for helping your baby fall asleep.

clipboardwin.name: Clipboard+ for Windows
clipboardwin.desc: A Windows tray clipboard manager that syncs with the Clipboard+ Android app.
clipboardwin.tagline: A Windows tray clipboard manager that syncs with your Android phone through your own Google Drive.
clipboardwin.long: Clipboard+ for Windows is a tray-resident clipboard manager that automatically records the text and images you copy. It shares the same data format as the Android Clipboard+ app, so your phone and PC sync bidirectionally through your own Google Drive (an app-private hidden folder) with no dedicated server. It captures clips via native Windows clipboard events without polling, and lets you organize text and images into groups and snippets and search across them.
features: Tray-resident with poll-free real-time clipboard monitoring (Win32 events), auto-capturing text and images
Bidirectional phone-to-PC sync through your own Google Drive — no dedicated server, using only the drive.appdata scope
Android-style UI with light/dark themes, group sidebar, snippets, and pin/copy/edit/search
Multi-select bulk move, delete, and merge, newest/oldest sorting, and a full-size image viewer
Global hotkeys to open the window and instantly capture text selected in other apps, plus run-at-startup
Export/import compatible with the Android Clipboard+ backup format (text JSON, image ZIP)

faq.q: Does it sync with the Android Clipboard+ app?
faq.a: Yes. Both apps share the same sync format and keep your phone and PC clipboards in sync bidirectionally through an app-private folder in your own Google Drive, with no dedicated server involved.

faq.q: Where is my clipboard data stored, and is it safe?
faq.a: Local data is stored in %APPDATA%\ClipboardPlus on your PC, and synced data lives only in an app-private hidden area of your own Google Drive. The app uses only the drive.appdata scope, so it never touches your regular Drive files.

faq.q: What do I need to enable sync?
faq.a: To turn on Google Drive sync, create a desktop OAuth client once in the Google Cloud Console, place the google_client.json file in the app folder, then click sync in the app to do a one-time Google sign-in and permission grant.
